note: Analyst-workflow taxonomy for the 50 public Finance Agent tasks. This is distinct from failure mode taxonomy: task type says what finance work was requested; failure mode says why a model missed it.

categories.label: M&A and transaction terms
categories.definition: Deal status, consideration, closing mechanics, listing consequences, acquisition rationale, and transaction-related costs.

categories.label: Guidance and earnings
categories.definition: Beat or miss versus guidance, guidance vintage, midpoint math, and earnings-release metric framing.

categories.label: Multi-year trends and KPIs
categories.definition: Reported operating metrics, unit economics, multi-period trends, CAGR, take rate, same-store sales, and other period-over-period measures.

categories.label: Financial modeling and scenarios
categories.definition: Forward estimates, scenario math, seasonality assumptions, refinancing impact, gross-profit projection, and decomposition of growth drivers.

categories.label: Capital structure and securities
categories.definition: Debt, shares outstanding, convertibles, preferred securities, leases, cash requirements, and other financing obligations.

categories.label: Filing disclosure and risk
categories.definition: Qualitative filing facts, risk factors, governance facts, management roles, regulatory risk, and disclosure definitions.

categories.label: Market and peer analysis
categories.definition: Cross-company comparisons, peer ranking, capex comparison, market positioning, and strategic analysis.

categories.label: Adjustments and non-GAAP bridges
categories.definition: GAAP to non-GAAP adjustments, restructuring costs, adjusted EBITDA bridges, SBC, and one-time or pro forma items.

tasks.rationale: Beat or miss versus pre-tax margin guidance.
Acquisition consideration measured at transaction close.
Beat or miss versus gross margin guidance.
Inventory turnover ratio from fiscal-year values.
Effective tax rate and year-over-year change.
Gross booking value per room night.
Debt face value excluding sustainability notes.
Operating KPI list and FY2024 totals.
Forward gross profit projection under assumptions.
Loan origination mix over recent periods.
Acquisition price, equity value, and enterprise value.
Adjusted EBITDA margin versus prior guidance.
Quarterly guidance metric taxonomy and framing.
Revenue growth decomposition into take-rate and volume.
Regional average nights per booking KPI.
EPS guidance beat history and guidance vintage.
Non-GAAP gross-profit guide beat or miss.
